title: Deterministic coverage-aware scenario foundation (consume canonical draft zoning-floor-area cap; no independent legal calc; no envelope inference)
objective: Build a deterministic, strict-JSON, coverage-aware scenario FOUNDATION at the service layer that consumes property_profile 1.4.0 and rule_evaluation 1.0.0 READ-ONLY and produces a typed scenario object with an explicit constraint/completeness model. Consume the canonical rule_evaluation trace output max_residential_floor_area_sq_ft (+ its citations/lifecycle) as a DRAFT zoning-floor-area cap under ZR 23-21 - never recompute FAR*lot_area as a second legal path, never relabel it as gross/net/sellable/feasible area or a buildable envelope, and never infer height/stories/setbacks/yards/parking/lot-coverage/efficiency/unit-count/gross-to-net/constructability (all MISSING per the coverage matrix). Produce NO scenario on spatial conflict, rule conflict, professional_review_required, or malformed/non-finite input. Any integrity recompute is verification-only, never replaces the canonical value, and fails closed on disagreement. Preliminary scenarios vary only via explicit typed assumptions (no hidden utilization/optimization defaults). Preserve provenance + completeness status on every constraint and output. Carry needs_review + not_verified_disclaimer end-to-end; never emit verified. Additive/fail-closed only; profile/spatial/rule engines and canonical contracts unchanged. Full spec: project-control/reports/M5-T001-DRAFT-PROPOSAL.md.
business_reason: M5 turns draft rule evaluation into honest feasibility framing. Foundation-first (completeness model + coverage matrix) prevents a floor-area cap being presented as a building. M5 engineering authorized against merged draft/needs_review M4 artifacts without treating M4 accepted (owner directives 2026-07-21/07-22); final acceptance still gated on genuine G6 legal approval of M4-T001 (not weakened; B-010 is not a blocker here).
inputs: packages/contracts/schemas/v1/rule_evaluation.schema.json (1.0.0) — evaluation_trace.outputs.max_residential_floor_area_sq_ft (canonical draft cap), coverage_status_draft, spatial_uncertainty, rule_conflict, family_coverage (READ-ONLY)
packages/contracts/schemas/v1/coverage_status.schema.json — canonical vocabulary (reference only; never redefine; narrow to exclude 'verified')
services/api/app/rules/rulesets/r5_residential_far.rule.json — confirms max_residential_floor_area_sq_ft is the canonical trace output (READ-ONLY)
packages/contracts/fixtures/valid/rule_evaluation/supported_family_draft.json — canonical example payload for AS fixtures
project-control/reports/M5-T001-DRAFT-PROPOSAL.md — authoritative full spec for this task
allowed_paths: services/api/app/scenario/** (new deterministic foundation module + typed constraint/completeness model; consume profile/rule-evaluation via read-only imports only)

packages/contracts/schemas/v1/scenario.schema.json (new ADDITIVE draft output contract; reference coverage_status narrowed to exclude 'verified', never redefined) + its generated typegen/runtime-bundle/fixtures under the existing generated/fixture dirs
forbidden_paths: services/api/app/profile/**, services/api/app/spatial/**, services/api/app/rules/** (consume READ-ONLY; no modification)
packages/contracts/schemas/v1/property_profile.schema.json, rule_evaluation.schema.json, coverage_status.schema.json (no edits to existing canonical contracts)
services/api/app/api/v1/** and any new public endpoint (service-layer only this slice)
apps/web/**, any 3D rendering, any polished UI (expansion/3D holds active)

Independent legal recomputation as the surfaced value; inferring height/stories/setbacks/yards/parking/lot-coverage/efficiency/unit-count/gross-to-net/constructability; relabeling the cap; hidden utilization or optimization defaults; emitting 'verified'; publishing/Verifying any rule; collapsing spatial uncertainty
project-control/** except own producer report; .claude/** except own agent-memory
acceptance_scenarios: AS-1 confident R5 cap: single-district-confident R5 profile + conditional rule_evaluation whose trace carries a finite max_residential_floor_area_sq_ft -> one PRELIMINARY scenario surfacing that CANONICAL value verbatim with the draft-zoning-floor-area-cap label, full provenance, coverage conditional (never verified), needs_review + disclaimer. Test asserts surfaced value == trace value (not locally recomputed).
AS-2 unsupported district: non-R5/unimplemented family -> typed unsupported stub, no cap, visible reason (not silence).
AS-3 missing constraint: required datum absent -> NO scenario; typed outcome naming the missing constraint; nothing inferred.
AS-4 spatial uncertainty: boundary/split-lot/sliver/invalid-geometry or professional_review_required -> NO scenario; share ranges/review flags surfaced, never collapsed.
AS-5 legal-rule conflict: data_conflict/rule_conflict -> NO scenario; conflict surfaced with competing-rule provenance.
AS-6 malformed/non-finite inputs: NaN/±inf/huge-int/wrong-type cap or area -> fail-closed typed outcome, no crash, no negative/NaN/inf value, strict-JSON preserved.

AS-7 integrity disagreement fails closed: verification recompute disagrees with canonical trace value -> engine emits data_conflict no-scenario, never surfaces either number; canonical value never replaced.
AS-8 deterministic ordering: identical input -> byte-identical output (constraints, reasons, scenarios, traces).
AS-9 never-Verified: exhaustive check no field == verified; disclaimer + needs_review lineage on every produced scenario and on the cap value.

AS-10 provenance & completeness preserved: every constraint and every output carries its completeness state (PRD §12) and provenance to source (rule citations+rule_id/version/status for the cap; profile field+dataset for lot area).

AS-11 explicit-assumption-only variation: a preliminary scenario with no assumptions == raw draft cap; a variant differs ONLY by an explicitly declared typed assumption; test proves no hidden utilization/efficiency/optimization factor is ever applied.
AS-12 regression: full repository CI green; zero modification to profile/spatial/rule-engine/canonical-contract code.
risks: HARD: consume property_profile 1.4.0 and rule_evaluation 1.0.0 READ-ONLY; surface the canonical max_residential_floor_area_sq_ft from the trace — never recompute it as the result value.

Never infer any envelope constraint (height/stories/setbacks/yards/parking/lot-coverage/efficiency/unit-count/gross-to-net/constructability); all MISSING per the coverage matrix. Never relabel the cap as gross/net/sellable/feasible area or a buildable envelope.
Fail closed: NO scenario on conflict/uncertainty/professional-review/malformed input; integrity recompute is verification-only and never replaces the canonical value.
No hidden utilization/optimization defaults; variation only via explicit typed assumptions. Never emit verified; carry needs_review + not_verified_disclaimer end-to-end.

M5 engineering authorized vs merged draft/needs_review M4 (owner 2026-07-21/07-22); FINAL ACCEPTANCE gated on genuine G6 legal approval of M4-T001 (dependency-accepted precondition) — NOT weakened. B-010 is not a blocker here.
Risk-required independent gates at ONE frozen SHA: G1 (new scenario contract), G3 (code), G4 (integration/regression), G5 (security). UI/3D excluded. CP-0032 not used.
Thin-client: local checkout + CI; negligible disk (no bulk data / no local db).
requirement_refs: PRD.md §7.2 (basic code-feasibility layer — deferred inferential fields are later, explicit-assumption/rule-backed work, never silently inferred here)
PRD.md §13, §13.1–§13.4 (scenario engine inputs/outputs/fields/validation; §13.3 field structure with completeness states; §13.4 reject-or-Conditional rule)
docs/PRODUCT_FLOW_AND_AI_BOUNDARIES.md (deterministic backend controls coverage; AI never up-labels or invents constraints)

progress_log.message: Contracted + claimed; scope frozen; implementation starting
